title: Phase 005 — Code Graph Adoption Evaluation Harness
description: ADAPT XCE benchmark methodology to lightweight local eval. CLI dispatcher spawns OpenCode subprocesses for 12-20 refactoring tasks in baseline (current advisor brief) vs after (Phase 004 mandate brief) modes. 3 primary metrics + 2 diagnostics + RQ8 token-reduction instrumentation. ~500 LOC: CLI + metric lib + task set + report generator + smoke test + stress config. Depends on Phases 001-004.
